title: Nested regressions: incremental predictive power
method: Sequential nested models: M0 (mean) -> M1 (hist) -> M2 (HAR) -> M3 (GARCH) -> M4 (cascade) -> M5 (FNO) -> M9 (all). Report R² and Spearman at each step.
headline: Adding cascade to hist+HAR+GARCH improves R² by 0.03-0.07 on SPY/XLK/XLF, both H1 and H2. The cascade contains new predictive information beyond HAR-RV and GARCH. This is the most important result for journal acceptance.
